FIGHT STRATEGY - Gremlin Nob
FIGHT TYPE: Elite (kill fast, minimize Skill plays)
WIN CONDITION: Kill before Enrage stacks make hits lethal. Nob has 83 HP + Regen 3/turn. Need ~90+ total damage.
ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: Minimize Skills to keep Enrage low. Block only when necessary.
KEY CARDS: Eruption (Wrath entry, Attack), Indignation (Wrath entry but Skill = triggers Enrage), Strikes
POTION PLAN: Swift Potion for extra draw if needed for damage.
RISKS: Playing too many Skills makes Nob hit for 20+ per turn. Vigilance and Indignation are Skills.

TURN 1 ANALYSIS:
- Nob intent: Bellow (gains Enrage 2). Not attacking.
- Nob does NOT have Enrage yet (Powers only show Regenerate 3).
- Skills on Turn 1 ARE safe since Enrage activates from Bellow which happens at end of enemy turn.
- Wait... Actually, Enrage means: whenever the PLAYER plays a Skill, gain +2 Str. If Enrage is not yet active, Skills don't trigger it.
- Bellow gives Enrage as his action. His action happens AFTER my turn.
- So Turn 1: Skills are free!

PLAN: Vigilance (enter Calm, 8 block unnecessary but positions for +3E next turn) + Strike (6 damage).
Next turn: Leave Calm (+3E from Violet Lotus) via Eruption (Attack, no Enrage trigger) into Wrath. Then dump attacks.

MARGIN NOTE: Nob Regenerate 3 means I need to deal 83 + 3/turn effective damage. Need to kill in ~4-5 turns ideally.

FIGHT STRATEGY - Hexaghost
FIGHT TYPE: Boss (spend HP freely for speed, but manage resources)
HP: 250. My HP: 52/72.

HEXAGHOST PATTERN:
T1: Activate (FREE - no damage)
T2: Divider = (52/12+1)*6 = 5*6 = 30 damage multi-hit
T3: Sear (6 + Burn)
T4: Tackle (5x2 = 10)
T5: Sear (6 + Burn)
T6: Inflame (FREE - gains 12 block + 2 Str)
T7: Tackle (5x2 = 10) [now with +2 Str = 7x2 = 14]
T8: Sear (6+2=8 + Burn) 
T9: Inferno (2x6 = 12 + 3 Burns + upgrade all Burns)

KEY PLAN:
- Turn 1 (FREE): Setup Powers (Battle Hymn, Rushdown). Enter Calm.
- Turn 2: MUST BLOCK 30. Use Block Potion (12) + Defends.
- Save Wave of the Hand for Inferno turn (Weak reduces Inferno).
- Enter Wrath on free turns (Activate, Inflame) for burst damage.
- Use Essence of Steel for Plated Armor (4 block/turn) early.

TURN 1 PLAN:
Hand: Empty Body, Indignation, Wave of the Hand, Battle Hymn, Eruption+
- Battle Hymn (1E): Sets up Smite generation. PRIORITY.
- Eruption+ (1E): 9 damage, enters Wrath. But I need a Wrath exit...
- Indignation (1E): Can enter Wrath OR apply Vulnerable if already in Wrath.
- If I play Battle Hymn + Eruption+ + Empty Body: 3E used. Battle Hymn (Power), Eruption+ (9 damage, enter Wrath, Rushdown not yet active), Empty Body (7 block, exit Wrath). But Rushdown not active yet.

Better plan: Battle Hymn (1E) + Essence of Steel (free, 4 Plated Armor) + Eruption+ (1E, 9 damage, enter Wrath) + Empty Body (1E, 7 block, exit Wrath). 3 cards played + 1 potion = Pocketwatch counts 3 cards. 

Wait: I dont have Rushdown in hand. It's in draw pile. So entering Wrath doesn't draw 2 yet. I should set up Powers first.

Plan: Battle Hymn (1E) + Eruption+ (1E, 9 damage, enter Wrath) + Empty Body (1E, 7 block, exit Wrath to no stance). 3E, 3 cards = Pocketwatch triggers. Next turn: 8 cards + Smite.

But I want to be in Calm for Turn 2 to get energy. Vigilance is in draw pile.

Alternative: Battle Hymn (1E) + Indignation (1E, enter Wrath) + Empty Body (1E, 7 block, exit). Same but no damage from Eruption. Then I have Eruption+ for Turn 2 burst from Calm.

Actually, I cant enter Calm on Turn 1 - Vigilance is in draw pile. So Turn 2 I wont get Calm exit energy.

Best T1: Battle Hymn (1E) + Eruption+ (1E, 9 damage) + Empty Body (1E, 7 block, exits stance). 3 cards = Pocketwatch. Essence of Steel for T2.

MARGIN NOTE: Divider on Turn 2 = 30 damage. Block Potion = 12. Need 18 more block from hand. With Pocketwatch (8 cards) I should have plenty of Defends.

FIGHT STRATEGY — Chosen (95 HP)
FIGHT TYPE: Hallway (full block)
WIN CONDITION: Kill before Hex accumulates too many Dazed cards. Use Attack-based entries, set up Powers early (don't trigger Hex).
ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: Block with Defend/Empty Body/Vigilance. Apply Weak via Wave of the Hand or Weak Potion.
KEY CARDS: Rushdown (Power, draw on Wrath), Battle Hymn (Power, Smite gen), Eruption+ (Attack-based Wrath entry)
POTION PLAN: Weak Potion when Chosen attacks hard. Swift Potion for draw if needed.
RISKS: Hex applied -> Skill plays add Dazed -> engine collapses. Minimize Skills after Hex.

TURN 1 — INCOMING: 5x2 = 10 — PATHS TO ZERO:
  A) Rushdown(1E) + Battle Hymn(1E) + Flurry(0E) = 3E used, 4 damage dealt, 0 block -> take 10 damage. NOT zero.
  B) Rushdown(1E) + Empty Body(1E) + Flurry(0E) = 2E, enter Calm via Empty Body (5 block), 4 damage. 5 block vs 10 = take 5. NOT zero.
  C) Indignation(1E) enters Wrath + Flurry(0E, 8 in Wrath) + Empty Body(1E, enters Calm, exits Wrath) = 2E, 5 block from Empty Body, 8 damage. But in Calm at end. 5 block vs 10 = take 5. NOT zero.
  D) Battle Hymn(1E) + Empty Body(1E) + Flurry(0E) = 2E, 5 block, 4 damage. Take 5. NOT zero.

No path to zero with this hand. Must minimize damage while setting up Powers (no Hex trigger).

BEST PLAN: Play Rushdown(1E) + Battle Hymn(1E) + Flurry of Blows(0E) = 3E. Deal 4 damage, take 10 damage (62/72 HP). 
- Both Powers set up for next turns without triggering Hex
- Flurry goes to discard, will return on stance changes
- Pocketwatch: played 3 cards, does NOT trigger (need ≤3 cards... wait, Pocketwatch triggers if 3 or fewer cards played. 3 cards = triggers! Draw 3 extra next turn = 8 card hand!)

Actually wait - should I play Empty Body instead of one Power? Empty Body(1E) = 5 block, saves 5 HP. But it's a Skill - if Hex gets applied later, I want Powers set up NOW while Hex is NOT active.

REVISED: Rushdown(1E) + Battle Hymn(1E) + Flurry(0E) = 3E, 3 cards played, Pocketwatch triggers. Take 10 damage but have 8-card hand next turn with both key Powers online. This is the setup turn.

OR: Battle Hymn(1E) + Empty Body(1E) + Flurry(0E) = 2E with 1E left. Empty Body gives 5 block and enters Calm. Then I have 1E left but no good use. Hmm, I could play Indignation to enter Wrath from Calm... but that's a Skill AND I end in Wrath taking doubled incoming. Bad.

FINAL: Rushdown(1E) + Battle Hymn(1E) + Flurry(0E). Take 10 HP loss for massive future payoff.
